description: Earnings Cascade Detector (10th engine). Multi-quarter accelerating PEAD streak (>=3 beats + acceleration) in 4-5 star quality moats. TITAN_CASCADE >=80 = NVDA-2022/AAPL-2017/MSFT-2014 pattern. Daily 14:15 UTC after PEAD.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Earnings Cascade daily 14:15 UTC after PEAD detector refresh
